markdownRemark.html:
Awesome ACG

A curated list of awesome tools and projects related to anime, comics, games, light novel, visual novel, vocaloid and touhou.

Sharing, suggestions and contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first.

Contents

  • Audio
  • Danmaku
  • Downloaders
  • Databases / Data Sources
  • Image Board
  • Image Generation
  • Image Processing
  • Image Recognition
  • Image Reverse Search
  • Mobile Apps
  • Programming
  • Subtitles
  • Tools
  • Web
  • Uncategorized
  • Developer Groups

Audio

  • 0x40-webstars301 - HTML5/CSS3 Canvas + Web Audio clone of the 0x40 Hues Flash. [English]
  • chiru.no - High quality ACG music streaming. [English]
  • Mikutap - Interactive music mixer with Hatsune Miku. [English]
  • moefm.shstars15 - Client script for moefm radio. [中文]
  • VOICEVOXstars1.2k - 無料で使える中品質なテキスト読み上げソフトウェア、VOICEVOXのエディター. [日本語]

Danmaku

  • ABPlayerHTML5stars872 - Video Player for danmaku comments. ABPlayer in HTML5. [English/中文]
  • CommentCoreLibrarystars1.8k - Javascript Live Comment (Danmaku) Engine Implementation. [English/中文]
  • Danmakustars533 - High performance JavaScript danmaku engine. [English/中文]
  • danmaku2assstars460 - Convert comments from Niconico/AcFun/bilibili to ASS format. [English/中文]
  • DPlayerstars13.3k - HTML5 danmaku video player. [English/中文]

Downloaders

  • Albireostars124 - Bangumi auto download and management project. It has a webclient called Denebstars30. [English]
  • anilist-crawlerstars40 - Crawl data from anilist API and store in elasticsearch. [English]
  • BooruDownloaderstars18 - Downloader for gelbooru, danbooru and other websites that use their engines. [English]
  • CeJSstars2.1k - Online novels / comics downloader. [English/中文]
  • Comic-DLstars460 - Command line tool to download manga and comics from various comic and manga sites. [English]
  • Danbooru Downloaderstars313 - Downloader for Danbooru. [English]
  • DMHYstars391 - Easily download/auto-download torrent(s) from share.dmhy.org / acg.rip etc. sites for OS X. [中文]
  • E-Hentai-Downloaderstars1.3k - Download E-Hentai archive as zip file. [English]
  • gallery-dlstars5.7k - Command-line program to download image-galleries and -collections from several image hosting sites. [English]
  • getComicstars194 - Download tencent comics. [中文]
  • imgbrd-grabberstars1.4k - Very customizable imageboard/booru downloader with powerful filenaming features. [English]
  • JComicDownloaderstars232 - Tool for downloading some comics and light novels from China. [中文]
  • MangaRipperstars173 - Download manga (Japanese Comic) from several websites for your offline viewing. [English]
  • OkanimeDownloaderstars13 - Scrape Arabic translated anime from Okanime without any effort. [English]
  • PixivUtil (Pixiv Downloader)stars1.9k - Downloader and tag manager for Pixiv. [English]
  • Pixiv Illuststars5 - Both a downloader and a third-party Node.js api for Pixiv. [English]
  • you-getstars45.7k - Dumb downloader that scrapes the web. [English]

Databases / Data Sources

  • AniDB API - Official API for AniDB. [English]
  • Anilist APIv2stars776 - Official API for Anilist (https://anilist.co/). [English]
  • Anilogiastars305 - Anime list database. [日本語]
  • anime-offline-databasestars548 - A JSON based offline anime database containing the most important meta data as well as cross references to various anime sites such as MAL, ANIDB, ANILIST, KITSU and more. [English]
  • anime-relationsstars70 - Episode redirections for Taiga. [English]
  • anime-streamingstars48 - A curated list of worldwide legal anime streaming. [English]
  • animecharactersdatabase - A anime characters database. [English]
  • Animeloop - Website for animeloop-cli. [English]
  • atwiki - A wiki anime STAFF. [日本語]
  • arm-serverstars65 - A service for mapping Anime ID's between AniList, AniDB, MAL, and Kitsu. [English]
  • Atarashii API - Unofficial API for MyAnimeList. [English]
  • AnimeThemes - A simple and consistent repository of anime opening and ending themes. [English]
  • Bangumi Datastars402 - Raw data for Japanese Anime. [中文]
  • cal.syoboi - anime bangumi timeline. [日本語]
  • Dhufufustars2 - Additional API Docs for some Chinese ACG sites & Related Services (currently outdated). [中文]
  • E-HentaiCrawlerstars374 - E-Heitai Crawler. [中文]
  • gochiusa-faces-dataset - A croped animeface dataset from 'Gochuumon wa Usagi Desuka?' [English]
  • 一言（ヒトコト） - Get random quotes from ACG. [中文]
  • hummingbird.me - Anime discovery platform. [English]
  • iakesistars6 - A website collection to map anime scene to real life locations(圣地巡礼). [English]
  • Jikan API - Unofficial API for MyAnimeList. [English]
  • manga-platformstars21 - A curated list of worldwide legal manga reading site. [English]
  • nyaastars3k - The software behind Nyaa.si. [English]
  • NyaaPantsustars960 - Nyaa.se replacement written in golang. [English]
  • pixivpystars1.4k - Pixiv API for Python. [English/中文]
  • sakugabooru - A booru like site with anime shot clip with sakuga label. [English]
  • Seiyuu.moestars15 - A webpage for searching collaborate anime works between seiyuu. [English]
  • Vocaloid Databasestars228 - Server software used by vocadb.net. [English]

Image Board

  • aint.moestars7 - Your waifu aint moe. [English]
  • animeshot2stars35 - An open and searchable image repository with telegram bot integration in Node.js. [English]
  • atogataristars16 - Share and discover your favorite anime characters. [English]
  • BooruSurfer2stars13 - Consistent and space-efficient interface to Booru-like image boards. [English]
  • danboorustars1.6k - Taggable image board written in Rails 4 for danbooru.donmai.us. [English]
  • Hydronstars87 - Media tagger and organizer backend and GUI frontend. [English]
  • Hydrusstars1.5k - A personal booru-style media tagger that can import files and tags from your hard drive and popular websites. [English]
  • Moeboorustars440 - Fork of danbooru1 that has been heavily modified. Used on yande.re , Konachan.com. [English]
  • PBoorustars37 - Permanent Booru is an image board web server which takes leverage of the decentralization of IPFS to distribute its content. [English]
  • szuruboorustars445 - Python-powered booru for small to medium communities. [English]
  • TagsTablestars227 - Chinese ⇔ Engish translation table for common booru tags. [中文]

Image Generation

  • Anime2Sketchstars1.6k - A sketch extractor for anime/illustration. [English]
  • AnimeFaceDrawer - Drawing Anime Face with Simple Segmentation Mask [English]
  • animate-mestars222 - A miniapp to convert selfie to anime. [中文]
  • avatars.moe - Automatic avatars generator. [English]
  • chainer-DCGANstars917 - Generate anime face with neural network. [日本語]
  • crypko.ai - Cryptocollectible game on anime character icons. [English]
  • DeepAAstars1.4k - Make Ascii Arts by Deep Learning. [English]
  • DeepAnime - Generate Anime automatically from illust. [日本語]
  • FindTwinstars1 - A pick and match game by random generated avatars. [English]
  • girl_friend_factory - Anime character generator (Description on Qiita). [日本語]
  • gwern.net blog - A anime GANs guidebook. [English]
  • hololive-fusion-generatorstars101 - Dynamically generates combinations of names and pictures of Hololive members on the fly. [English]
  • kemonogenstars115 - Kemono Friends logo generator. [日本語]
  • make.girls.moe - Create Anime Characters with A.I. [English]
  • seeprettyface dongmanstars150 - A stylegan danbooru pretrain model with Chinese document. [中文]
  • Talking Head Anime - Talking Head Anime from a Single Image (source). [English]
  • This Anime Does Not Exist - Synthesize Your Waifu Full-body using StyleGAN2. [English]
  • This Fursona Does Not Exist - AI-generated furries in an endless scrolling grid. [English]
  • This Waifu Does Not Exist - Synthesize Your Waifu Face using StyleGAN2. [English]
  • TwinGANstars720 - Unsupervised Image Translation for Human Portraits to anime. [English]
  • Waifu Labs - Synthesize Your Waifu Face Conditionally. [English]

Image Processing

  • Anime4Kstars15.4k - A High-Quality Real Time Anime Upscaler. [English]
  • animeloop-clistars93 - Automatically detect and cut anime loops. [English]
  • cgCompressstars13 - Compression tool tailored for Visual Novel CGs. [English]
  • DeepCreamPy - Decensoring hentai with deep neural networks. [English]
  • hoshizora - Merge two image by alpha channel to get displayed respectively on white/black background. [English]
  • MangaCraftstars728 - Semi-automatic manga colorization. [English]
  • mangaEditor - Edit manga and translate it online. [中文]
  • Overmixstars153 - Automatic anime screenshot stitching in high quality. [English]
  • PaintsChainerstars3.7k - Line drawing colorization using chainer. [English]
  • Real-ESRGANstars15.5k - Practical Algorithms for General Image/Video Restoration. [English/中文]
  • Real-ESRGAN-GUIstars133 - Real-ESRGAN GUI Wrapper. [日本語]
  • sketchKerasstars422 - An u-net with some algorithm to take sketch from paints. [English]
  • style2paintsstars15.2k - Paint line images with AI. [English]
  • TachibanaYoshino AnimeGANstars3.8k - shinkaimakoto mentioned "shinkaimakoto" animestyle transfer model [English]
  • upscale.wiki.anime - Image Super-Resolution model wiki [English]
  • waifu2xstars24.9k - Image Super-Resolution for Anime-Style Art. [English]
  • waifu2x-converter-cppstars321 - Improved version of waifu2x. [English]
  • Waifu2x-Extension-GUIstars8k - Video, Image and GIF upscale/enlarge(Super-Resolution) and Video frame interpolation. Achieved with Waifu2x, SRMD, RealSR, Anime4K, RIFE, CAIN, DAIN and ACNet. [English/中文]
  • WaifuCutout - Image segmentation (matting) for Anime characters. [English/中文]

Image Recognition

  • alt-i2vstars34 - Alternative illustration2vec implitation of sigmoids of fully connected layer. [日本語]
  • animeface-2009stars277 - Face and Landmark Detector for Anime/Manga. Similar to lbpcascade_animeface but more accurate. [English]
  • AnimeFace Search v3 - Face detection for Anime. Powered by Imager::AnimeFace and otama - CBIR Enginestars61. [日本語]
  • AniSegstars165 - A faster-rcnn model for anime character segmentation. [English]
  • danbooru-taggerstars14 - auto labeling danboorulike tags for anime illustration. [English]
  • deep cascaded landmark detectionstars180 - Anime face landmark detection by deep cascaded regression. [English]
  • Illustration2Vecstars657 - Semantic Vector Representation of Illustrations. [English]
  • lbpcascade_animefacestars1.8k - Face detector for anime/manga using OpenCV. [English]
  • LFFD animefacestars44 - A fast and light-weighted anime face detection based on LFFD &mxnet. [English]
  • n_jigen_bot - Telegram bot. Identify if an image is 二次元 or 三次元. [English]
  • Osomatsu-san - Use deep learning to distinguish the characters in Osomatsu-san. [日本語]
  • transfer-learning-animestars175 - Transfer learning for anime characters recognition. Powered by lbpcascade_animefacestars1.8k for face detection. Available at MoeFlow. [English]

Image Reverse Search

  • ascii2d - 2D art search. [日本語]
  • Gochiusearchstars391 - Fast Scene Search Engine for 'Gochuumon wa Usagi Desuka?'. [日本語]
  • Image Search Options (Chrome Extension / Firefox Add-on) - Search multiple image reverse search engines. [English]
  • iqdb - Multi-service image search engine, source code here. [English]
  • SauceNAO - Reverse image search service, see database coverage here. [English]
  • saucenao.kgmi.moe - Better front-end for SauceNAO. [English]
  • WAIT: What Anime Is This?stars3.6k - Anime scene search engine. Powered by liresolrstars162. [English]

Mobile Apps

  • Amadeusstars901 - A side project that aims to replicate the Amadeus App shown in Steins;Gate 0. [English]
  • Atarashiistars80 - Android client for MyAnimeList. [English]
  • EhViewerstars7.3k - Unofficial E-Hentai Application for Android. [中文]
  • KonaBotstars28 - iOS client for konachan.net. [English]
  • LNReader-Androidstars115 - Light novel reader for android. [English]
  • NineAnimatorstars597 - Elegant, concise, and intuitive anime discovery app for iOS. [English]
  • Tachiyomistars19.1k - Free and open source manga reader for Android. [English]

Programming

  • aaencoderstars38 - Convert Javascript to kaomoji(顔文字). [日本語]
  • gochiusa_langstars18 - . [日本語]
  • hanabistars238 - Colorful syntax highlighter inspired by kemono-friends-syntax-highlight and its friends. [English]
  • hhiro_langstars5 - . [日本語]
  • kawaii-termstars105 - Kawaii shell terminal to relieve engineer's stress. [日本語]
  • kemono_friends_langstars194 - . [日本語]
  • nyaruko_langstars147 - . [日本語]
  • RADWIMPSstars259 - 君の then-then-then 世は Promise で Future. [日本語]
  • We-i_langstars1 - . [日本語]

Subtitles

  • aeneasstars2k - Automagically synchronize audio and text. [English]
  • ASS.jsstars425 - JavaScript ASS subtitle format renderer. [English]
  • dialogue.moestars190 - Search where a dialogue comes from. [English/中文]
  • JavascriptSubtitlesOctopusstars304 - Displays subtitles in .ass format and easily integrates with HTML5 videos. Supports all SSA/ASS features. [English]
  • libjassstars170 - Renders ASS subs in the browser. [English]
  • SubBuilderstars8 - Toolset to help checking and organizing bilingual subtitles (諸神字幕組). [English/中文]
  • subsearch.madsck.com - Search source of anime dialogue. [English/中文]
  • Sushistars523 - Automatic subtitle shifter based on audio. [English]

Tools

  • anitomystars196 - Anime video filename parser. [English]
  • arc_unpackerstars479 - Visual novel extracting tool in CLI. [English]
  • bgmstars20 - Display bangumi list in CLI. [中文]
  • Comicbookstars269 - Convert online comics to .epub e-book. [English]
  • getnativestars174 - Find the native resolution(s) of upscaled material (mostly anime). [English]
  • kuroshirostars562 - Japanese language utility mainly for converting Kanji-mixed sentence to Hiragana, Katakana or Romaji with furigana and okurigana modes supported. [English]
  • OpenCCstars6.7k - Project for conversion between Traditional and Simplified Chinese. [中文]
  • rankit.ikely.me - Scientific ranking of anime ratings by Rankitstars63. [English]
  • Shoko - Anime Collection Manager. [English]
  • Taigastars1.7k - Lightweight anime tracker for Windows. [English]
  • Visual Novel OCRstars52 - Japanese optical character recognition for visual novels. [English]
  • wikipedia_anime_graphstars4 - Calculate anime relevance from wikipedia. [日本語]

Web

  • acgn-stockstars260 - Stock market for trading waifu on PPT (Taiwan). [English/中文]
  • awesome-bangumistars174 - Collection of bangumi.tv related projects. [中文]
  • Bangumi scriptsstars255 - Collection of user scripts for bangumi.tv. [中文]
  • Denebstars30 - Web client for Albireostars124. [English]
  • japari-pediastars55 - Chrome extension that turns Wikipedia into Japari-Library. [English]
  • kalidofacestars283 - Face and Body Tracking for Live2D / 3D models on the web. [English]
  • KarasamaEggstars5 - KarasamaEgg dynamic wallpaper for WallpaperEngine. [English]
  • Kemono Adblockerstars12 - Replace Advertisements with Kenomo Friends pictures using perceptual techniques. [English]
  • MIKUFLA - Dance as Hatsune Miku yourself to the song. [日本語/English]
  • Moelib - Website with collections of various nijigen(二次元)-related development resources with filters and multi-language support. Inspired by awesome-acg. [English]
  • My Diary - MyDiary from movie 「Your Name」.[中文]
  • nKemonostars16 - Chrome Extension that replaces all images with Kemono Friends. [English]
  • ojosama-webstars43 - テキストを壱百満天原サロメお嬢様風の口調に変換するWebアプリ. [日本語]
  • pixi-live2dstars606 - Display live2D model as a sprite in pixi.js. [English]
  • WebLive2Dstars31 - Rebuild of Cybernoids' Live2D demo for interactive systems on mobile platforms. [English]

Uncategorized

  • AnimeEffectsstars697 - 2D Animation Tool. [English]
  • Anime-Girls-Holding-Programming-Booksstars15k - Anime Girls Holding Programming Books. [English]
  • guide.encode.moestars106 - A anime RIPPER manual. [English]
  • Hime Displaystars75 - Universal desktop model displayer for Live2D, Spine, MMD and VRoid. [English/中文/日本語]
  • marine_buttonstars40 - Play 宝鐘マリン's voice on web. [日本語]
  • notify.moestars289 - Fetches your anime "watching" list and notifies you when a new anime episode is available. [English]
  • Vignettestars401 - The open source VTuber software. [English]

Developer Groups

Some chat rooms or channels of ACG-loving developers

  • AniDevTwitter [English]
  • Fuyu [English]
  • IQDB / SauceNAO [English]
  • MoeOverflow [中文]
  • MoeFront [中文]
  • Project ShangriLa [日本語]
